subject: Energy Retrieval — item card showing a bright orb or energy sphere with radiating streaks of light against a dark purple background
description: The art depicts a bright central orb or sphere emitting radiating streaks of light outward in multiple directions against a deep dark purple-black background. The orb appears white-yellow at the core with surrounding pink-red energy dots or smaller orbs arranged symmetrically around it. The overall composition is radial and symmetric, suggesting energy gathering or returning. The mood is clean and slightly retro, reminiscent of classic PTCG item card design.
foreground: bright central orb with radiating white streaks and surrounding pink-red smaller spheres
